name: tanstack-migrator
description: Orchestrates Fresh/Deno → TanStack Start storefront migrations: issue-driven pipeline, mesh sandboxes running Claude, branch+PR flow, parity via Playwright, visual dashboard + home widgets

scripts.dev: concurrently -k -n api,web -c magenta,cyan "bun run dev:api" "bun run dev:web"
scripts.build:web: MCP_APP_ENTRY=dashboard MCP_APP_EMPTY_OUTDIR=true vite build && MCP_APP_ENTRY=widget-active MCP_APP_EMPTY_OUTDIR=false vite build && MCP_APP_ENTRY=widget-queue MCP_APP_EMPTY_OUTDIR=false vite build
scripts.build: bun run build:web && bun run build:server
